headline: 暑期档热力不减，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up with New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：热门趋势《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》领跑，本周无新片上映，但《安昂传奇》等大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment digest: 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' top trends; no new releases today, but 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and more are coming soon.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周无新片上映，暑期档进入短暂调整期。
industryHighlights.en: No new films released this week; summer season hits a brief pause.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》与《穿普拉达的女王2》持续热度，位列本周趋势前列。
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' and 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' remain hot, topping weekly trends.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》等四部大片定档，即将引爆市场。
industryHighlights.en: Four major films including 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' are set to ignite the box office.
